ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "recipe_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "preparation_time" TEXT /* Preparation time for the recipe */,
  "cook_time" TEXT /* Cooking time for the recipe */,
  "method" TEXT /* Description of the cooking method */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients required for the recipe */,
  "recipe_url" TEXT /* URL of the recipe */,
  "nutrients" TEXT /* Nutritional information for the recipe */,
  "food_category" TEXT /* Food category of the recipe (e.g., veg, non-veg) */,
  "morbodities" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions or morbidities associated with the recipe */,
  "recipe_category" TEXT /* Category of the recipe (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recipe */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe yields */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine (e.g., Italian, Mexican, Indian) */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions (e.g., vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better search and discovery */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_food_category FOREIGN KEY ("food_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe the ingredient belongs to */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the ingredient required */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "optional" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the ingredient is optional */,
  "substitutes" TEXT /* Possible substitutes for the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrients" (
  "nutrient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe the nutrient belongs to */,
  "nutrient_name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient (e.g., Energy, Protein, Carbohydrates) */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the nutrient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the nutrient */,
  "daily_value" TEXT /* Percentage of daily value for the nutrient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category to support hierarchical categories */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of an icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recipe author, nutritional analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
